query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_duplicados
FROM (
  SELECT 
    leadId, 
    corretorId, 
    DATE(dataFollowUp) as data, 
    COUNT(*) as count
  FROM follow_ups
  WHERE status = 'pendente'
  GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) AS duplicados;

  COUNT(*) as total_duplicados
FROM (
  SELECT 
    leadId, 
    corretorId, 
    DATE(dataFollowUp) as data, 
    COUNT(*) as count
  FROM follow_ups
  WHERE status = 'pendente'
  GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) AS duplicados;
